projects.baseline: AgentStatus is 5-value union in TWO places (pixel-types.ts + types.ts). Linger timer already exists. 12 files reference AgentStatus.
projects.findings: Duplicate AgentStatus type in pixel-types.ts and types.ts. Linger timer infrastructure already built. No new CharacterState needed — IDLE pose works for paused. statusIcons.ts needs 2 new sprite frames. All 12 files will get TypeScript errors on expansion — safe to find all sites.
projects.recommended_approach: Consolidate duplicate type. Add paused|done to union. Update toAgentStatus mapping. Wire applyAgentStatus (paused=inactive at desk, done=linger then break room). Update chooseDestination, statusIcons, renderer, panelUtils, priority map. Let TS errors guide remaining fixes.

follow_ups.action: Verify panelUtils statusDotColor/statusPriority handle raw server statuses
